message:
chore(deps): replace git-pinned asupersync rev 08dd31df with crates.io v0.3.0

asupersync was pinned at git rev 08dd31df (~2000 commits behind HEAD).
Now that v0.3.0 ships on crates.io, replace the git pin with a
standard version spec so consumers (including frankenterm,
coding_agent_session_search, and transitive callers) no longer have
to patch it.

- Cargo.toml: `asupersync = { git =
  "https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/asupersync", rev = "08dd31df",
  features = ["proc-macros", "test-internals"] }` → `{ version =
  "0.3.0", features = ["proc-macros", "test-internals"] }` at
  [workspace.dependencies]. All workspace members using
  `asupersync = { workspace = true }` pick up the crates.io source
  without further edits.
- Cargo.lock is gitignored (.gitignore:5), so it's regenerated on
  fresh build and not committed.
